ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of stock data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous day's close */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the indicator belongs to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the technical indicator */,
  "candle" REAL /* Candlestick pattern */,
  "bb_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bb_middle" REAL /* Middle Bollinger Band */,
  "bb_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns of the stock */,
  "stoch_k" REAL /* Stochastic Oscillator K */,
  "stoch_d" REAL /* Stochastic Oscillator D */,
  "short_ema" REAL /* Short Exponential Moving Average */,
  "long_ema" REAL /* Long Exponential Moving Average */,
  "short_vama" REAL /* Short Volume-weighted Moving Average */,
  "long_vama" REAL /* Long Volume-weighted Moving Average */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the signal belongs to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the trading signal */,
  "signal" TEXT /* Type of trading signal (e.g., BUY, SELL, HOLD) */,
  "anomaly" INTEGER /* Anomaly detected (0 = no anomaly, 1 = anomaly) */,
  "signal_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trading signal */,
  "confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the signal (0-100) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used to generate the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the risk metrics belong to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the risk metrics */,
  "trend_cnt" INTEGER /* Trend counter */,
  "dtrend_cnt" INTEGER /* Down trend counter */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit/loss */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock price */,
  "liquidity" REAL /* Liquidity of the stock */,
  "risk_rating" TEXT /* Overall risk rating */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss level for the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert belongs to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., trend change, anomaly) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "user_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has read the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
